required_documents.photo: Recent passport-size color photograph (4.5cm x 3.5cm) with white background

voting_process_steps.title: Identity Verification
voting_process_steps.description: First official checks your name on the electoral roll and verifies ID.

voting_process_steps.title: Inking & Registration
voting_process_steps.description: Second official inks your finger, registers you in Form 17A, and gives a slip.

voting_process_steps.title: Slip Verification
voting_process_steps.description: Third official verifies the ink mark and activates the EVM.

voting_process_steps.title: Cast Your Vote
voting_process_steps.description: Press the blue button next to your candidate on the EVM. Listen for the beep.

voting_process_steps.title: VVPAT Verification
voting_process_steps.description: Check the VVPAT window for 7 seconds to see your vote's confirmation slip.

booth_etiquette: No mobile phones or cameras inside the booth.
Follow queue discipline; priority for seniors/PWD.
No campaigning within 100 meters of the booth.
